comment: mcp-agent-mail-core. Classified OFFLINE (bundled ranges, no network).

entries.summary: am < 0.3.13 can wedge startup (serve-http blocks the listener bind on unbounded recovery; port never opens) and grow atc_experiences without bound (observed 2.41GB / 629k rows in 6 days). Upgrade to >= 0.3.13, then `am doctor reconstruct` to slim the DB.
entries.fingerprint: atc_experiences grows unbounded; 99% CPU during startup replay; HTTP port never bound
